author: APEX orchestrator (Claude Opus 4.7)
anchor_policy: Every claim cites an audit JSON path, a filesystem read, or a verbatim quote from PHASE_STATE.json / shot_list.json.

agent_build.safety_tests_live_audit: apex/audit/anim-05/safety-tests-live.json (actual cmd / exit / stdout-tail per case, captured 2026-06-07T05:59Z)

safety_tests_summary.tier_not_ready_hunyuan: TIER_NOT_READY exit 7 — Hunyuan NODES_INSTALLED_WEIGHTS_DEFERRED never returns PLAN (F-1 r1 fix)
safety_tests_summary.rerun_guard: WILL_OVERWRITE_REFUSED exit 5 — confirmed in live capture
safety_tests_summary.symlink_outright_refusal: discover_clips() lstat()-checks p.is_symlink() and skips before resolve/hash (F-4 r1 fix: closes TOCTOU window)
safety_tests_summary.wrapper_required: plan_tier returns TIER_NOT_CONFIGURED when wrapper_invocation is missing/empty even for READY tier (F-2 r1 fix)

magical_realm_playground_catalog.phase_state_anchor_quote: session_2026_04_01_mv.shots = '20/20 complete — 19 Wan2.2 i2v two-stage MoE + 1 skip (existing). Zero errors.'
magical_realm_playground_catalog.production_set_rule: First 20 ls-sorted MP4s are the production shipment per PHASE_STATE; remaining 18 are extras/alts (cataloged but not promoted).

operator_gated_blockers: MA-ANIM-001..005 (PRs #7, #8, #9, #10, and the upcoming ANIM-05 PR)
G9 fal.ai key-resolution route — not pursuable autonomously

policy_contribution_under_r15.finding_summary: On Windows + pure Python, the open()-to-handle binding window for symlink/reparse-point detection is not atomically closable without Win32 CreateFile ctypes shims. The agent uses pre-resolve+commonpath + lstat symlink refusal + handle-bound os.open/fstat/os.read + post-read resolve+commonpath re-check; the residual TOCTOU is the single open() call between pre-check and kernel-acquired handle.
policy_contribution_under_r15.trust_assumption_recorded_in_spec: SPEC-ANIM-05.md §Trust assumption (refined round 6 after Codex correctly noted manifest resolved_path surfaces //192.168.50.246/Extra/... UNC form): clip root is a Windows drive-letter mapping to an SMB share on the operator's home-LAN QNAP NAS (station QNAP-NAS / 192.168.50.246), operator-owned, behind operator's home router/firewall, no untrusted writers, agent runs interactively as operator on workstation on the same LAN.
policy_contribution_under_r15.codex_resolution_path_quoted: Codex round 5 explicitly named 'treat the catalog root as trusted-only and document that assumption explicitly' as the acceptable resolution.
policy_contribution_under_r15.r17_accept_as_is_rationale: Documented trust assumption + recorded mitigation path for future untrusted-root use (Win32 CreateFile + GetFileInformationByHandle).
policy_contribution_under_r15.swap_to_untrusted_clip_root_followup: When ANIM-* later targets an untrusted clip root, replace os.open with ctypes CreateFile(FILE_FLAG_OPEN_REPARSE_POINT) and validate file-id via GetFileInformationByHandle.
